chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–7843 of 2019 C. P. No. D–6334 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.08.2024 Mr. Fahad Khan Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Mohsin Qadir Shahwani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Masood, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr. Saifullah, A.A.G. Sindh. M/s. Riaz Ahmed, Director (Law), Abdullah Hajrah, Deputy Director (Law) and Sarmad Sarwar, Assistant Director (Law), ECP..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. These petitions challenge the competence and eligibility of respondent No.1 who was at one point in time holding the office of the MNA. Since the assembly was dissolved, he is no longer holding the office of MNA and virtually these petitions have now become infructuous and the questions are only left as academic. Hence, dismissed as having become infructuous. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the connected petition. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
